query:
-- Assign tenant to Tavonga Shoko (user ID 1) and set insurer role
UPDATE users 
SET tenant_id = 'tenant-1771335377063',
    role = 'insurer',
    insurer_role = 'executive'
WHERE id = 1;

-- Verify update
SELECT id, name, email, role, insurer_role, tenant_id FROM users WHERE id = 1;
